commit_scope: Admit token-band to the fourth-arm floor by making its blueprint reservation module-local and using direct fixed token projections.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: token-band now runs as a manifest-covered fourth-arm fkwu row at verdict 3 while the full Form suite remains divergence-free.
test_flows: form:full validate.sh -> 147 fourth-arm bands, 565 ok, 0 divergent
metal-plane audit -> macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF receipts pass

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/audit-log.fk form-stdlib/tests/audit-log-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hmac-sha256.fk form-stdlib/token.fk form-stdlib/tests/token-band.fk
local_validation.notes: token-band now passes as a true fourth-leg row at 3. Full validation reports fourth arm: 147 band(s) four-way, 565 ok, 0 divergent. Metal-plane audit passes macOS arm64 Mach-O and Android arm64 ELF receipts.
